The Sandville Community Center received _______ of art supplies.
The sales associates often _______ potential client accounts at the weekly meeting.
Ravelia Hotels is building a hotel _______ Wingate Mall.
Starting this Thursday, all Tenacore employees will be required to wear _______ official uniforms.

The Standbridge Company _______ its staff to work remotely one or two days each week.
Please arrive ten minutes before your appointment to allow enough _______ to fill out some paperwork.
_______ you have any questions about the updated contract, please contact Human Resources.
The printed _______ for the upcoming musical are kept in the theater director's office.
Laboratory chemicals should be stored no _______ than eye level and never on top of a tall cabinet.
According to Reilly's vehicle fleet manager, _______ company delivery vans will be serviced in August.
Because airlines _______ revise baggage-check policies, passengers should check for updates before a flight.

Companies that seek a stable workforce should focus on employee _______ as well as recruitment.
_______ a new user-friendly interface on its Web site, the Kramer-Lee Company reported improved customer satisfaction.
Chef Wingert is reluctant to open a second location of Antoine's Pizza _______ interest from many of his customers.
_______ thinking by Ms. Blakely's marketing team helped increase sales of the Mindi motorcycle.
